name: Weisenheimer
description: A Hyperion SMG that tightens up the longer you keep firing and always spawns with a corrosive Maliwan barrel. That pairing gives it stronger elemental chance and damage over time than a standard Hyperion SMG, while still preserving the brand's trademark stabilising fire. It is not a flashy rarity piece, but its reliable corrosive output makes it a very solid workhorse.
notes: Related fixed-element Hyperion SMGs include Backburner for incendiary, Storm for shock, Wellness for slag, and Cooler for cryo. It appears only at green rarity or higher. In The Pre-Sequel, it commonly uses Hyperion's newer materials and a similar prefix style. An older Hyperion variant there is named the Ascerbic. Random world drop from suitable loot sources.
